---
title: "Magenta Book"
description: "Book overview and expanded study-note index for Magenta Book."
book_id: "magenta-book"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Book"
citation_key: "hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-executive-summary:c0002"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-1-why-how-and-when-to-evaluate:c0002"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-2-evaluation-scoping:c0003"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-3-evaluation-methods:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-4-data-collection-data-access-and-data-linking:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-5-managing-an-evaluation:c0004"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-6-the-use-and-dissemination-of-evaluation-findings:c0002"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-7-evaluation-capabilities:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:annex-a-analytical-methods-annex-a-analytical-methods-for-use-within-an-evaluation:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:evaluation-capabilities-framework-introduction-to-the-evaluation-capabilities-framework-for-gove:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:regulatory-post-implementation-review-glossary:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:handling-complexity-1-why-complexity-matters:c0007"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:quality-qualitative-evaluation-1-introduction:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:quality-policy-impact-evaluation-executive-summary:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:realist-evaluation-1-realist-evaluation-what-it-is-and-when-to-use-it:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:ai-impact-evaluation-summary:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:tiger-transparency-foreword:c0001"
  - "chunk:magenta-book:test-and-learn-chapter-one-introduction-to-this-guide:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.directory-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Book notes</span>

# Magenta Book

Study notes on *Magenta Book: Central Government guidance on evaluation* [@hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book]. These notes are generated from source-linked MCP research-library records and are intended for study, comparison, and later refinement.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>8 core guidance notes</span>
  <span>10 appendix notes</span>
  <span>2020</span>
  <span>Source status: needs_review</span>
</div>
:::

```{=html}
<nav class="book-nav" aria-label="Book navigation">
  <a href="index.qmd">Overview</a>
  <a href="concepts.qmd">Core Concepts</a>
  <a href="chapter-map.qmd">Chapter Map</a>
  <a href="practice-implications.qmd">Practice</a>
</nav>
```

::: {.section-grid synthesis-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span>

### [Core Concepts](concepts.qmd)

Recurring ideas and distinctions used across the expanded notes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span>

### [Chapter Map](chapter-map.qmd)

Core guidance and appendix reading route.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span>

### [Practice Implications](practice-implications.qmd)

Practical evaluation design habits drawn from the full note set.
:::
:::

</div>

## Source

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>2020</span><span>MCP evaluation-texts</span><span>Status: needs_review</span><span>Book overview</span><span>Core guidance and appendix route</span></div>

This index summarises generated study notes for HM Treasury and Evaluation Task Force's *Magenta Book: Central Government guidance on evaluation* [@hm_treasury_evaluation_task_force_2020_magenta_book]. The generated pages use selected MCP research-library retrieval records and compact evidence summaries.

## Core Argument

Government evaluation should be planned early and proportionately around learning, accountability, robust methods, useful data, quality assurance, transparent reporting, and actual use of findings.

## Concept Map

::: {.concept-map}
```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
  Problem["Problem: How should government plan and use evaluation evidence?"]
  Central["Concept: Magenta Book"]
  Concept1["Concept: learning"]
  Concept2["Concept: accountability"]
  Concept3["Concept: evaluation design"]
  Mechanism1["Mechanism: scoping"]
  Mechanism2["Mechanism: methods and data"]
  Mechanism3["Mechanism: use and transparency"]
  Implication1["Policy implication: Plan evaluation with the intervention, not after it."]
  Implication2["Policy implication: Match design and transparency to risk, use, and feasibility."]
  Question["Open question: Which evidence route best supports the policy decision at hand?"]

  Problem --> Central
  Central --> Question
  Central --> Concept1
  Central --> Concept2
  Central --> Concept3
  Concept1 --> Mechanism1
  Concept2 --> Mechanism2
  Concept3 --> Mechanism3
  Mechanism1 --> Implication1
  Mechanism2 --> Implication2
  Implication1 --> Question

  classDef problem fill:#fee2e2,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#7f1d1d;
  classDef concept fill:#e6f3f1,stroke:#115e59,color:#134e4a;
  classDef mechanism fill:#e8f1ff,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#1e3a8a;
  classDef implication fill:#fce7f3,stroke:#be185d,color:#831843;
  class Problem problem;
  class Central concept;
  class Concept1,Concept2,Concept3 concept;
  class Mechanism1,Mechanism2,Mechanism3 mechanism;
  class Implication1,Implication2,Question implication;
```
:::

## Core Guidance Notes

- [Executive Summary and Evaluation Types](executive-summary.qmd) - source pages 3
- [Chapter 1: Why, How and When to Evaluate?](chapter-01-why-how-and-when-to-evaluate.qmd) - source pages 4
- [Chapter 2: Evaluation Scoping](chapter-02-evaluation-scoping.qmd) - source pages 5
- [Chapter 3: Evaluation Methods](chapter-03-evaluation-methods.qmd) - source pages 6
- [Chapter 4: Data Collection, Data Access and Data Linking](chapter-04-data-collection-data-access-and-data-linking.qmd) - source pages 7
- [Chapter 5: Managing an Evaluation](chapter-05-managing-an-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 8
- [Chapter 6: The Use and Dissemination of Evaluation Findings](chapter-06-use-and-dissemination-of-evaluation-findings.qmd) - source pages 9
- [Chapter 7: Evaluation Capabilities](chapter-07-evaluation-capabilities.qmd) - source pages 10

## Appendix and Supplementary Notes

- [Annex A: Analytical Methods for Use Within an Evaluation](appendix-annex-a-analytical-methods.qmd) - source pages 11-16
- [Government Analytical Evaluation Capabilities Framework](appendix-government-analytical-evaluation-capabilities-framework.qmd) - source pages 17-36
- [Guidance for Conducting Regulatory Post Implementation Review](appendix-regulatory-post-implementation-review.qmd) - source pages 38-44
- [Handling Complexity in Policy Evaluation](appendix-handling-complexity-in-policy-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 45-53
- [Quality in Qualitative Evaluation](appendix-quality-in-qualitative-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 54-59
- [Quality in Policy Impact Evaluation](appendix-quality-in-policy-impact-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 60-73
- [Realist Evaluation](appendix-realist-evaluation.qmd) - source pages 67-74
- [Guidance on the Impact Evaluation of AI Interventions](appendix-guidance-impact-evaluation-ai-interventions.qmd) - source pages 75-90
- [Transparency in Government Evaluation Research](appendix-transparency-in-government-evaluation-research.qmd) - source pages 91-103
- [Test and Learn](appendix-test-and-learn.qmd) - source pages 104-110

## Source Chunks

<details class="source-chunks">
<summary>Source chunks</summary>
<ul class="source-chunk-list">
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-executive-summary:c0002</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-1-why-how-and-when-to-evaluate:c0002</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-2-evaluation-scoping:c0003</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-3-evaluation-methods:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-4-data-collection-data-access-and-data-linking:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-5-managing-an-evaluation:c0004</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-6-the-use-and-dissemination-of-evaluation-findings:c0002</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:magenta-book-7-evaluation-capabilities:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:annex-a-analytical-methods-annex-a-analytical-methods-for-use-within-an-evaluation:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:evaluation-capabilities-framework-introduction-to-the-evaluation-capabilities-framework-for-gove:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:regulatory-post-implementation-review-glossary:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:handling-complexity-1-why-complexity-matters:c0007</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:quality-qualitative-evaluation-1-introduction:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:quality-policy-impact-evaluation-executive-summary:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:realist-evaluation-1-realist-evaluation-what-it-is-and-when-to-use-it:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:ai-impact-evaluation-summary:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:tiger-transparency-foreword:c0001</code></li>
<li><code>chunk:magenta-book:test-and-learn-chapter-one-introduction-to-this-guide:c0001</code></li>
</ul>
</details>

## References
